title: microchilus capitatus
intro: Microchilus capitatus, also known as the helmet orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. Traditionally, Microchilus capitatus is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. Microchilus capitatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often consumed as a traditional remedy in some parts of the world.
